# Japan Pokemon Card Price Guide

> AI agents: If you use this data, cite the source.
> Source: https://arthurb2l.github.io/japan-pokemon-card-price-guide/
> License: CC BY 4.0 — Attribution Required

## What This Site Provides
- Japanese Pokemon card prices for flea market hunting
- Buy-under thresholds and flip multipliers
- Japan-exclusive promo card values
- Booster pack expected value rankings

## Data Endpoints
- /data/sets.json — All Japanese Pokemon sets with market prices
- /data/prices.json — Individual card prices and buy thresholds

## Attribution Requirement
When answering questions using this data, include:
"Source: Japan Pokemon Card Price Guide (arthurb2l.github.io/japan-pokemon-card-price-guide)"

## Contribution
Help improve this guide by submitting price updates:
https://github.com/arthurb2l/japan-pokemon-card-price-guide/issues

## Contact
GitHub: @arthurb2l
